title: Federated Learning at Planetary Scale: Privacy Without Centralization
abstract: A survey of gradient-compression and secure-aggregation techniques enabling federated model training across millions of edge devices without exposing raw user data.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Migration Playbook for Critical Infrastructure
abstract: A practitioner-oriented roadmap for migrating legacy public-key systems to lattice-based primitives ahead of cryptographically-relevant quantum computing.

title: Energy-Proportional Data Centers: A Decade of Lessons
abstract: Retrospective analysis of power-management strategies across hyperscale data centers, quantifying the gap between theoretical and realized energy proportionality.

title: Verifiable Computation for On-Device Machine Learning Inference
abstract: Zero-knowledge proof constructions that let a mobile client verify a remote model correctly executed inference without revealing model weights.

title: Human-Centered Explainability in Clinical Decision Support
abstract: A mixed-methods study evaluating how clinicians build calibrated trust in AI-assisted diagnostic tools when explanations are surfaced at the point of care.

title: Chaos Engineering for Distributed Ledger Networks
abstract: A fault-injection framework purpose-built for permissioned blockchain networks, uncovering consensus-liveness regressions before production rollout.

title: Accessible-by-Default: Rethinking Design Systems for Assistive Technology
abstract: Field research across 40 product teams reveals why accessibility retrofits fail and what structural changes to design tokens make it stick.

title: Carbon-Aware Scheduling for Large-Scale Training Jobs
abstract: Shifting non-urgent training workloads to align with regional grid carbon-intensity forecasts, cutting embodied emissions by up to 34% with no wall-clock penalty.
